why_v20r_was_invalid: It was visually aligned to the bundle fallback/thumbnail instead of the rendered runtime onboarding source.

changes_made: Mounted the real onboarding source in the first-access shell through a full-screen iframe.
Added click bridging for source-native Começar and pular so the dashboard still manages the local onboarding key.
Kept Meu Negócio > Ver boas-vindas novamente functional by clearing the local key and reloading.
Captured exact render evidence and flow evidence with a local CDP harness.
validations_executed: first-access harness flow: no key -> complete -> reload -> replay -> skip
